name: Rusty Scythe
description: Clears overgrown paths. Better than nothing — barely.

name: Warm Blanket
description: For cold nights and weary travellers who gave theirs away.

name: Honey Pot
description: A generously sized clay pot. Significantly larger than before.

name: Leather Boots
description: Sturdy soles for long patrols and roads with opinions.

name: Oil Lamp
description: Keeps the darkness honest. Burns steady in the worst wind.
